reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: Comparing the phone numbers on page 3 of the source PDF with the output, a digit error was found in one number. The source number '910-564-4194' was converted to '910-564-2194'. This is a critical accuracy failure.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: A significant omission was identified in the Consent Agenda section on Page 4. The sub-bullets detailing item 5f ('i. Monthly Reports per PSP' and 'ii. Mitchell County Grant Extension Request') are entirely missing from the output list.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: i. Monthly Reports per PSP ii. Mitchell County Grant Extension Request

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy skips level 2. The document title at index 1 is H1. The next heading at index 36 ('6. Executive Director Report') is assigned H3, skipping H2. This is a violation of semantic heading structure.

Multiple tables exhibit structural corruption. 1) In the 'ROLL CALL' table (index 9), the header row contains 4 columns, but several data rows (e.g., Row 3, Eric Boyette) contain only 3 cells. This causes data to shift; for example, Eric Boyette's vote mark for 'VIA MS TEAMS' (column 3 in the source) is placed in cell 2 (column 2 'IN PERSON') in the output. 2) The 'ROLL CALL VOTE' table at index 35 is missing its header row entirely ('NC 911 BOARD MEMBERS', etc.), starting directly with data. 3)
concerns.source_pdf_quote: In the 'ROLL CALL' table on Page 2, Eric Boyette has an 'X' in the third column ('VIA MS TEAMS/PHONE').
concerns.output_quote: In index 9, Row 3 has 3 cells total. Cell 2 is 'X'. Cells in row 1 define col 2 as 'IN PERSON' and col 3 as 'VIA MS TEAMS'.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: There are transcription errors in the names listed in the tables that alter meaning. Specifically, 'Buddy Martinette' is misspelled as 'Buddy Marinette' in the attendance table, and 'Earl Struble' is misspelled as 'Earl Sturble' in the first roll call vote table.
concerns.location: Section 2 reading_order 9 row 10; Section 4 reading_order 35 row 15

concerns.analysis: The 'Consent Agenda' section on Page 4 contains fund accounts (c, d, e) with nested lists of balances and disbursements. The output (index 24-32) loses this list structure, rendering the items as a flat sequence of paragraphs.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: c) CMRS Fund/Account\nApril 2020 Month-End Balance $7,769,914\nApril 2020 Disbursement $0
concerns.output_quote: Three separate paragraph elements (index 24, 25, 26) with no list association.
